moduleDescription: Exception and effect types used in Nim code.

entries.name: TimeEffect
entries.description: Time effect.

entries.name: IOEffect
entries.description: IO effect.

entries.name: ReadIOEffect
entries.description: Effect describing a read IO operation.

entries.name: WriteIOEffect
entries.description: Effect describing a write IO operation.

entries.name: ExecIOEffect
entries.description: Effect describing an executing IO operation.

entries.name: IOError
entries.description: Raised if an IO error occurred.

entries.name: EOFError
entries.description: Raised if an IO "end of file" error occurred.

entries.name: OSError
entries.code:
OSError = object of CatchableError
  errorCode*: int32          ## OS-defined error code describing this error.
entries.description: Raised if an operating system service failed.

entries.name: LibraryError
entries.description: Raised if a dynamic library could not be loaded.

entries.name: ResourceExhaustedError
entries.description: Raised if a resource request could not be fulfilled.

entries.name: ArithmeticDefect
entries.description: Raised if any kind of arithmetic error occurred.

entries.name: DivByZeroDefect
entries.description: Raised for runtime integer divide-by-zero errors.

entries.name: OverflowDefect
entries.description:
Raised for runtime integer overflows.

This happens for calculations whose results are too large to fit in the provided bits.

entries.name: AccessViolationDefect
entries.description: Raised for invalid memory access errors

entries.name: AssertionDefect
entries.description:
Raised when assertion is proved wrong.

Usually the result of using the assert() template.

entries.name: ValueError
entries.description: Raised for string and object conversion errors.

entries.name: KeyError
entries.description:
Raised if a key cannot be found in a table.

Mostly used by the tables module, it can also be raised by other collection modules like sets or strtabs.

entries.name: OutOfMemDefect
entries.description: Raised for unsuccessful attempts to allocate memory.

entries.name: IndexDefect
entries.description: Raised if an array index is out of bounds.

entries.name: FieldDefect
entries.description: Raised if a record field is not accessible because its discriminant's value does not fit.

entries.name: RangeDefect
entries.description: Raised if a range check error occurred.

entries.name: StackOverflowDefect
entries.description: Raised if the hardware stack used for subroutine calls overflowed.

entries.name: ReraiseDefect
entries.description: Raised if there is no exception to reraise.

entries.name: ObjectAssignmentDefect
entries.description: Raised if an object gets assigned to its parent's object.

entries.name: ObjectConversionDefect
entries.description: Raised if an object is converted to an incompatible object type. You can use of operator to check if conversion will succeed.

entries.name: FloatingPointDefect
entries.description: Base class for floating point exceptions.

entries.name: FloatInvalidOpDefect
entries.description:
Raised by invalid operations according to IEEE.

Raised by 0.0/0.0, for example.

entries.name: FloatDivByZeroDefect
entries.description:
Raised by division by zero.

Divisor is zero and dividend is a finite nonzero number.

entries.name: FloatOverflowDefect
entries.description:
Raised for overflows.

The operation produced a result that exceeds the range of the exponent.

entries.name: FloatUnderflowDefect
entries.description:
Raised for underflows.

The operation produced a result that is too small to be represented as a normal number.

entries.name: FloatInexactDefect
entries.description:
Raised for inexact results.

The operation produced a result that cannot be represented with infinite precision -- for example: 2.0 / 3.0, log(1.1)

Note: Nim currently does not detect these!

entries.name: DeadThreadDefect
entries.description: Raised if it is attempted to send a message to a dead thread.

entries.name: NilAccessDefect
entries.description:
Raised on dereferences of nil pointers.

This is only raised if the segfaults module was imported!
